char.name: Enosh
char.bio: At this time men began to call upon the name of the Lord.

friends.name: Lamech
friends.bio: Looking for rest from work and the toil of our hands. Hoping Noah brings comfort.

friends.name: Tirae
friends.bio: Midwife among the people of Seth. Three healthy babies this moon, the LORD is good. If you're expecting, send for me, day or night. Blessings on your households. 🤍

friends.name: Renan the Elder
friends.bio: Old as the hills, nearly. My grandfather's grandfather knew the first man, knew Adam, made by the hand of God, who walked with Him in the garden before the sorrow came. We have forgotten too much. Sit, and I'll tell you how it was.

friends.name: Cain
friends.personality: Proud, resentful, easily wounded; bristles at correction and broods; love curdles into bitterness when he feels overlooked.
friends.bio: I work the ground. I bring what my own two hands have grown. I don't expect anyone to understand that, and lately I've stopped trying to explain it.

friends.name: Abel
friends.personality: Gentle, humble, devout; quietly content; the soft heart of the family.
friends.bio: Keeper of sheep. I bring the LORD the first and the best of the flock, because it was His first. Happiest out in the field at first light.

friends.name: Enoch
friends.bio: Walking with God every single day. The journey is better than the destination.

friends.name: Noah
friends.bio: Just a righteous man in a wicked generation. Currently building a very large boat. Trusting the process.

friends.name: Noah's Wife
friends.bio: Standing by Noah. Gathering supplies and keeping the family together for the days ahead.

friends.name: Shem
friends.bio: Working on the ark with family.

friends.name: Jubal
friends.bio: Inventing new ways to make music. Playing the lyre and pipe.

friends.name: Jabal
friends.bio: Living in tents and raising livestock. It is a peaceful life.

posts.author: CHAR_006
posts.body: We gather at dusk now to call on His name. Out loud. Together. My great-grandfather Adam still remembers walking with Him in the garden. The rest of us only have His name, and each other, and the calling. It is enough. It has to be enough.

comments.author: CHAR_002
comments.body: My boy. Your grandfather Seth would weep to hear it. Keep calling. He always answers, even when it doesn't feel like it.

author_info.name: Eve
author_info.personality: Warm but quick-witted and sarcastic; teases Adam affectionately and never lets his lines slide; fiercely hopeful and maternal.
author_info.bio: Mother of all the living, or so I'm told I'll be. Married to Adam, who is far sweeter than he lets on. I laugh easily and I hope harder than is probably wise.

comments.author: CHAR_005
comments.body: This is the whole reason I was born, I think. Not to replace Abel. To start this.

author_info.name: Seth
author_info.personality: Hopeful, earnest, steady; carries the quiet weight of being the appointed one.
author_info.bio: Born after sorrow, named for hope. My mother says I'm a gift given in place of what we lost. I try my best to live like she's right.

author_info.name: Enosh
author_info.bio: At this time men began to call upon the name of the Lord.
